federation.note: The agentic-memory aggregator CORE — a typed RDF agent-memory model (mem:MemoryItem) + Solid-pod store + client-side search, so a memory written by one agent is readable, searchable and portable across another (and across agent-memory adapters: mem0 / OpenClaw / LangChain / Letta all map TO this model, mirroring AS2.0's role for chat). Mints only mem:MemoryItem + mem:embeddingRef; reuses schema.org, Dublin Core, PROV-O and ActivityStreams. Not-siloed memory↔chat link via prov:wasGeneratedBy → as:Note / pc:ChatRoom. GitHub-installable now (committed dist/, ignore-scripts=true); npm publish is a deferred migration, not a blocker.
